name: WeChat Connector
description: Read local WeChat 4.x messages on this computer and expose read-only query methods through Baijimu Local.

remoteCapabilities.name: wechat.messages.read
remoteCapabilities.description: Read local WeChat message history after the user configures local database access.

remoteCapabilities.name: wechat.messages.search
remoteCapabilities.description: Search local WeChat messages by keyword.

remoteCapabilities.name: wechat.events.messageReceived
remoteCapabilities.description: Emit local WeChat message notifications through Baijimu Local.
